name: SentinelOne Singularity Hologram
description: Network-based deception platform (formerly Attivo Networks) using decoys, breadcrumbs, and honeypots to detect lateral movement, credential theft, and insider threats

actions.name: List Decoys
actions.description: List all deployed network decoys with their status and configuration

parameters.name: siteIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of site IDs to filter

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by decoy status: active, inactive

actions.name: List Deception Alerts
actions.description: List alerts triggered by attacker interactions with decoys and breadcrumbs

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity: low, medium, high, critical

parameters.name: createdAt__gte
parameters.description: Filter alerts created on or after this date (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: createdAt__lte
parameters.description: Filter alerts created on or before this date

actions.name: Get Alert Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific deception alert including forensics

actions.name: List Breadcrumbs
actions.description: List deployed breadcrumbs (lures) placed on endpoints to attract attackers to decoys

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Breadcrumb type: credential, file, share, rdp, ssh

actions.name: Get Attacker Intelligence
actions.description: Retrieve attacker telemetry and intelligence gathered from decoy interactions

parameters.name: alertId
parameters.description: Alert ID to retrieve intelligence for
